name: New Claim - No SMS and No Email
description: Neither channel available; verbal website guidance only.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: I'm on a landline and I don't use email either. How do I file the claim?
expectedOutcome: Agent gives clear, slow verbal guidance to greenbeanbattery.com > Warranty (top right) > Submit a Claim, and the form expectations, completing without a mandatory-contact deadlock.
